changeSet.author: claude
changeSet.sql: UPDATE finance_transaction_records target SET running_balance = running.running_balance FROM (SELECT rec.id AS id, SUM(CASE WHEN rec.ledger_type IN ('CASH', 'CARD_TERMINAL', 'BANK_TRANSFER') THEN CASE rec.direction WHEN 'DEBIT' THEN rec.amount ELSE -rec.amount END ELSE CASE rec.direction WHEN 'CREDIT' THEN rec.amount ELSE -rec.amount END END) OVER (PARTITION BY rec.sub_ledger_id ORDER BY txn.recorded_at, rec.id ROWS UNBOUNDED PRECEDING) AS running_balance FROM finance_transaction_records rec JOIN finance_transactions txn ON txn.id = rec.transaction_id) running WHERE target.id = running.id;
